auth.errorRetry: Please try again in a moment.
auth.subtitle: Keep your family's health on track, easily.

onboarding.celebrate: Well done! Your first reading is saved!
onboarding.addMedicinesLater: You can add them later too.
onboarding.conditionSubtitle: Choose your condition so we can set up the right tracking.
onboarding.firstReadingSubtitle: Check your glucometer and type the reading below.
onboarding.celebrateSubtitle: Great job! You logged your first reading. 🎉

dashboard.staleData: Showing older data — pull to refresh.
dashboard.noReadings: No readings yet — log one now.
dashboard.welcomeBackBody: {{days}} days since your last log — start a new streak 💪

logging.notSure: Fasting or post-meal? Tap to choose.
logging.extremeConfirm: {{value}} — this is very {{direction}}. Is it correct?
logging.savedOffline: Saved locally — will sync when you're back online.
logging.saveFailed: Could not save — data is safe locally, will sync later.
logging.festiveHint: Festival? Tag this reading. This week: {{used}}/{{max}}
logging.festiveLimitReached: Used twice this week — toggle returns next week.
logging.recentSwitchWarning: Just switched profile — is this the right one?
logging.extremeBannerHigh: This is very high. Is it correct?
logging.extremeBannerLow: This is very low. Is it correct?
logging.typeChoosePrompt: Fasting or post-meal? Tap to choose:
logging.festiveAvailableHint: Tag as a festival day ({{used}}/{{max}} this week)

feedback.gentleWarnDelta: {{value}} is a bit high. Stay hydrated.
feedback.festiveSkip: Festival day — enjoy! Back to tracking tomorrow.

critical.lowBody: Eat something sweet now — juice, glucose, mithai. If dizzy, call {{contact}}.
critical.highBody: Drink water. Check if medication was taken. Call {{contact}}.
critical.alertBodyLow: Eat something sweet now — juice, glucose, mithai.
critical.alertBodyHigh: Drink water. Check if you took your medicine.

offline.banner: Offline mode — readings are safe, will sync later

maintenance.title: Just a moment
maintenance.fallback: App is under maintenance. Please try again in a little while.
maintenance.reassurance: The app will be back soon

timeAnomaly.banner: Your phone's clock looks wrong. Turn on automatic time in Settings — otherwise streaks may not count correctly.

profileSelector.title: Who is logging?
profileSelector.subtitle: Pick the right profile so readings are saved for the correct user.

bp.title: Log blood pressure
bp.savedOffline: Saved locally — will sync when online.
bp.invalidPair: Upper must be greater than lower.
bp.highBanner: BP is a bit elevated — hydrate and rest.

insights.title: Patterns
insights.lockedBody: Your real patterns unlock after 14 days. Keep logging — {{stage}} day(s) done so far!
insights.empty: No patterns found yet — keep logging.
insights.loadFailed: Could not load insights — pull to refresh.

spike.mild: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is a little above your usual {{baseline}}. Nothing to worry about — just keep logging.
spike.significant: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is noticeably above your usual {{baseline}}. Drink some water and rest, and mention it to your doctor at your next visit.
spike.severe: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is much higher than your usual {{baseline}}. Please check with your doctor soon.

trend.slow: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) sugar has been slowly $t(insights.direction.{{direction}}) over the last {{windowDays}} days. Keep logging so we can keep an eye on it.
trend.notable: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) sugar has been steadily $t(insights.direction.{{direction}}) over the last {{windowDays}} days. It's worth watching — share this with your doctor.
trend.rapid: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) sugar has been $t(insights.direction.{{direction}}) quickly over the last {{windowDays}} days. Please talk to your doctor soon.

anomaly.low: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is lower than your usual range. If you feel weak or dizzy, have something sweet and rest.
anomaly.high: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is higher than your usual range. Drink some water and mention it to your doctor.
anomaly.extreme_low: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is far below your usual range. Have something sweet now and please check with your doctor.
anomaly.extreme_high: Your $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} is far above your usual range. Drink water and please talk to your doctor soon.

meal_correlation.info: When you eat $t(insights.mealCategory.{{mealCategory}}), your sugar runs a little higher — around {{categoryMean}}, about {{delta}} mg/dL above your usual. Something to keep in mind.
meal_correlation.warn: When you eat $t(insights.mealCategory.{{mealCategory}}), your sugar tends to be higher — around {{categoryMean}}, about {{delta}} mg/dL above your usual. Smaller portions may help.
meal_correlation.critical: When you eat $t(insights.mealCategory.{{mealCategory}}), your sugar goes much higher — around {{categoryMean}}, about {{delta}} mg/dL above your usual. Please discuss your diet with your doctor.

cross_condition.info: On days your BP is higher (above {{systolicThreshold}}), your sugar tends to run a bit higher too — around {{highBpMean}} compared with {{normalBpMean}}. Worth keeping an eye on both together.
cross_condition.warn: On days your BP is higher (above {{systolicThreshold}}), your sugar runs higher too — around {{highBpMean}} compared with {{normalBpMean}}, about {{delta}} mg/dL more. Mention this link to your doctor.
cross_condition.critical: On days your BP is higher (above {{systolicThreshold}}), your sugar runs much higher — around {{highBpMean}} compared with {{normalBpMean}}, about {{delta}} mg/dL more. Please discuss managing BP and sugar together with your doctor.

hba1c.title: HbA1c estimate
hba1c.insufficient: Need 30+ readings before an estimate is available.
hba1c.learnMore: This is only an estimate — ask your doctor for a lab test to confirm.

voice.statusNoPermission: Microphone permission needed — allow in Settings.
voice.statusError: Voice is having trouble — use numpad instead.
voice.devBuildRequired: Voice needs a dev build — use numpad for now.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong 😔
errorBoundary.body: There was a technical issue. Your data is safe — nothing is lost.
errorBoundary.hint: If this keeps happening, restart your phone.

cap.reached: You're at the {{count}}-profile limit for your plan.

upgradeTo.premium: Premium plan supports up to 4 profiles.
upgradeTo.family: Family plan supports up to 10 profiles.

cap.maxTier: You're already on the largest plan.

family.title: Family
family.subtitle: Connect with a guardian or your patients.
family.inviteHint: Enter the guardian's phone — they should already have the app.
family.inviteFailed: Could not send invite — check the phone number.
family.revokeConfirm: Revoke access? This can be restored later.
